description: Stylish and uber cool, these casual shoes with a square toe, mat design and stitch detailing from Provouge add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality leather upper and no laces, they are easy to wear and take off. They look great with jeans and even chino trousers for that semi formal look. Easy to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Leather upper for added durability and style Square toe and mat design for a more stylish look Elastic gores on either side of the mid-foot for a more versatile Fit Midsole Padded leather inner lining for keeping the feet dry, offering all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with a terraced lugs for maximum grip and comfort Slightly raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Upper glued to the outsole shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
